message:
🧹 Zero raw-font-size ratchet and extract remaining chart hex colors (#10266) (#10268)

Zeroes the raw-font-size ratchet (3→0) by extracting CHART_LEGEND_FONT_SIZE
and CLUSTER_MARKER_FONT_SIZE constants. Extracts Gauge status colors and
ChangeTimeline fallback color to named constants, lowering raw-hex 262→256.

Ratchet baselines:
  raw-hex:       262 → 256 (−6)
  raw-font-size:   3 →   0 (zeroed)

Fixes #10266

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
Co-authored-by: Reviewer Agent <reviewer@claude-dev.local>
